content:
Paid Internship Opportunity Alert - Legal

M.C. Kochhar & Associates is hiring Legal Interns for the months of July, August and September 2026. Join our litigation team for an internship experience focused on civil, criminal, commercial litigation and arbitration matters.

The selected intern will work with good research and drafting skills, with a proactive and detail-oriented approach

Location : Delhi, Indore & Bhopal

Stipend : Based on Performance

Interested candidates can refer to the link for more details https://lnkd.in/gKUQnjZ

Join WhatsApp Group for free and early access to the Daily Job and Internship updates: https://lnkd.in/gP8udJsj

Join Telegram Group for free and early access to the Daily Job and Internship updates: https://lnkd.in/gMXAwDXe
comment: Litigation internships are most valuable when interns get exposure to court strategy, client interaction and drafting iterations, not just research assignments. A structured learning process can make this experience truly impactful.
